name: Carnegie Clean Energy Limited
analysis: CCE's 9-SMA is above the 26 and price has reclaimed them. It is coming off a base, 5% below its one-year high, so there is room to run. Price has broken above the base high at A$0.1900. RSI has turned up through its signal line. Trade idea: entry A$0.2050, stop A$0.1089, target A$0.4933 (3.00:1) — then trail it.
